purpose: Structured launch-priority and activation-gate matrix for the 10 OPLURIX source products.
global_rule: Only founder-approved products may move from source-only to waitlist or from waitlist to active checkout.

launch_sequence.reason: Clearly bounded value, simple PDF-plus-template delivery, and lower technical complexity.
Strong buyer outcome and straightforward delivery as a guide plus editable slides.
Strong pain point and offline fit, but still needs a workbook and cleaner delivery bundle.

products.minimum_activation_gate: Keep the current manual delivery and buyer feedback loop clean.
products.agent_rule: Can be sold and discussed openly as a live product.

products.minimum_activation_gate: Package the templates, test payment confirmation, and verify the delivery path end to end.
products.main_blocker: Packaging and delivery are not yet verified.
products.agent_rule: Mention as the first next sellable product, but do not imply active checkout yet.

products.minimum_activation_gate: Refresh equipment specs, pricing logic, and update workflow before public launch.
products.main_blocker: Fast-changing product facts make a static first launch risky.
products.agent_rule: Keep as internal pipeline only for now.

products.minimum_activation_gate: Package the editable slide assets and test the buyer delivery path.
products.main_blocker: Delivery package and checkout path still need verification.
products.agent_rule: Mention as the second next sellable product, but keep checkout off.

products.minimum_activation_gate: Add workbook files, examples, and a clean delivery bundle.
products.main_blocker: The source document is strong, but the delivery package is not yet productized.
products.agent_rule: Can be discussed as a future product, not a near-term checkout.

products.minimum_activation_gate: Extract editable checklists, timelines, and team planning sheets.
products.main_blocker: Needs asset extraction beyond the source document.
products.agent_rule: Keep internal until the operational templates are packaged.

products.minimum_activation_gate: Add data schemas, templates, and sample harmonization assets.
products.main_blocker: The product promise is strong but still too document-only for a first-cycle launch.
products.agent_rule: Treat as a later technical product, not a near-term storefront addition.

products.minimum_activation_gate: Prepare a stronger technical proof bundle with code, schema, and example outputs.
products.main_blocker: High technical complexity and proof expectations.
products.agent_rule: Discuss only as pipeline or technical future work unless the founder explicitly activates it.

products.minimum_activation_gate: Show stronger proof and define support boundaries before public sale.
products.main_blocker: High-stakes buyer expectations and credibility burden.
products.agent_rule: Do not present as a near-term product without explicit founder approval.

products.minimum_activation_gate: Reframe as a flagship service or institutional offer, not a normal lightweight download.
products.main_blocker: Scope and buyer type are too large for a simple digital-product launch.
products.agent_rule: Treat as future flagship commercial infrastructure, not a current downloadable product.
